phrases.intent_en: Ask where the flower clock is
phrases.cultural_note: The Horloge Fleurie (flower clock) has been a Geneva landmark since 1955. It sits at the lake's edge in the Jardin Anglais and has a five-metre diameter.

responses.english: By the lake, on the right.
responses.phonetic: oh BOR doo LAK, soor lah DRWAHT
responses.local: Au bord du lac, sur la droite.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about the best time to photograph the flower clock
phrases.text_local: Quelle est la meilleure heure pour photographier l'horloge fleurie ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel eh lah meh-YUR UR poor foh-toh-grah-FYAY lor-LOZH fluh-REE
phrases.cultural_note: The clock is most photogenic in the morning with soft light and fewer crowds. The flowers are changed seasonally to maintain the display.

responses.english: In the morning, with the sun.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there are boat trips leaving from here
phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il des promenades en bateau qui partent d'ici ?
phrases.pronunciation: ee-ah-TEEL day prohm-NAD on bah-TOH kee PART dee-SEE
phrases.cultural_note: The CGN lake steamers depart from the nearby Jardin Anglais landing stage, offering cruises on Lake Geneva to Lausanne, Montreux and beyond.

responses.english: Yes, at the dock, right there.

phrases.intent_en: Ask about picnicking in the garden
phrases.text_local: Est-il possible de pique-niquer dans le jardin ?
phrases.pronunciation: eh-TEEL poh-SEE-bluh duh peek-nee-KAY don luh zhar-DAN
phrases.cultural_note: The Jardin Anglais is a popular spot for picnics with views over the lake. The lawns are open to the public free of charge.

responses.english: Yes, it's allowed on the lawns.
responses.phonetic: wee, seh oh-toh-ree-ZAY soor lay puh-LOOZ
responses.local: Oui, c'est autorisé sur les pelouses.

phrases.intent_en: Comment on the view of Mont Blanc
phrases.text_local: Par temps clair, on aperçoit le Mont Blanc depuis ce jardin — c'est époustouflant !
phrases.pronunciation: par TOHN KLAIR oh-nah-pair-SWAH luh mohn BLOHN duh-PWEE suh zhar-DAN — seh ay-poos-too-FLOHN
phrases.cultural_note: On clear days Mont Blanc is visible from the Jardin Anglais — a stunning backdrop that locals never tire of, even after years of living in Geneva.

responses.english: Yes, on a clear day you can see it well.
responses.phonetic: wee, par TAHN KLEHR ohn luh vwah BYEHN
responses.local: Oui, par temps clair on le voit bien.
